ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was executed */,
  "worker_count" INTEGER /* Number of workers used in the transaction */,
  "secondary_worker_count" INTEGER /* Number of secondary workers used */,
  "reservations" INTEGER /* Number of reservations made */,
  "relations" INTEGER /* Number of relations involved */,
  "queries" INTEGER /* Number of queries executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time in milliseconds */,
  "warning" TEXT /* Any warnings generated during execution */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration used */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database being monitored */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., read, write, mixed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Any error messages generated during the transaction */,
  "system_load" REAL /* System load during the transaction */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance log entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., WARNING, ERROR) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "n_workers" INTEGER /* Number of workers allocated */,
  "n_secondary_workers" INTEGER /* Number of secondary workers allocated */,
  "n_reservations" INTEGER /* Number of reservations allowed */,
  "n_relations" INTEGER /* Number of relations allowed */,
  "n_queries" INTEGER /* Number of queries allowed */,
  "password_work_factor" INTEGER /* Work factor for password hashing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generated */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance log entry used for the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report summarizing performance analysis */,
  "generated_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the report */,
  "approved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES performance_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES performance_reports ("report_id")
)
